name: Nobuo Terashima
description: He is the guitarist of Blast; attended the same high school as Nana Osaki. He is friendly and optimistic, but at times, he tends to miss the focus of conversations around him. Before Nana's "smoking ban", he's the only non-smoking member of Blast. But, his poor threshold for alcohol meant that he leaked many secrets while he's drunk (most notably, about Nana and Ren's relationship to Shin). Like Yasushi, Nobu comes from a rich family (his parents own an inn). Despite this, he is still very passi

name: Izumi Curtis
description: __Nationality:__ Amestrian Izumi Curtis, born Izumi Harnet, the teacher of Ed and Alphonse Elric, agreed to train the brothers to hone their alchemical abilities after their mother died. She expands their training with a regimen of philosophy, martial arts, and living off the land. name: Waver Velvet
nativeName: ウェイバー・ベルベット
description: __Height:__ 157 cm Waver Velvet is a nineteen year old student at Clock Tower, an institute of the Magus Association, and mage with a recognized magical lineage of three generations. While he is talented, he is not recognized by his peers or lecturers. An intelligent young man, Waver came up with the revolutionary concept that a mage's power could be increased through effort, experience, and knowledge rather than increasing magical potential through that of a mage's heirs. name: Hiyori Juujou
description: Hiyori Juujou, a third-year student in the middle division of Hiragi Gakukan. Her sword is Kogarasumaru. She is serious, cool, and stoic. She has the strongest sense of responsibility among the Toji, and once she decides on something, she doesn't bend. Her sword skills center on speed, and even among the Toji, her skills are among the best.

name: Hanako Honda
description: An energetic and bright girl who can both play sports and hit the books. However, that doesn't mean she's the sharpest knife in the drawer. She admires popular girls with fulfilling lives, and she's currently part of her middle school's soft tennis team in order to become one herself. However, there seems to be no hope of her becoming popular anytime in the near future. (Source: ANN)

name: Hawk
description: Hawk is a talking pig and Meliodas's companion. He is introduced as the cleaner of the Boar Hat bar who helps clean the disgusting food scraps. He is a relatively large pink pig who wears an earring with the word star boar on his left ear. His body is well rounded and his legs are fairly short. He has a unique patch of black spots shaped like a four-leafed clover. His body and appearance are fairly similar to a typical Gloucestershire Old Spots Pig.

name: Ranma Saotome
description: Training with [Genma](https://anilist.co/character/9913) at Jusenkyou in China, Ranma was thrown into a spring called Nyanniichuan. He emerged as a young girl, according with the spring's curse. When splashed with hot water, he changes back to a boy, but when splashed with cold to room temperature water, he turns into a girl again. description: __Class:__ 2-B __Height:__ 174 cm Keima Katsuragi is a 17-year-old high school student attending Maijima High School Academy. At an early age, he acquired an obsessive interest in video games; now he is known as "The Capturing God (Otoshi-gami)" in the gaming world for his legendary skills in "capturing" any girls in dating sims.

name: Neiru Aonuma
description: A girl who has very distinct green eyes and pigtails. She is very quiet and still at most times, loves herself and makes no initiative to get to know people. On the contrary, she avoids contact with people. She confesses to [Ai](https://anilist.co/character/199892/Ai-Ohto) her goal, to save [her sister](https://anilist.co/character/260352), for whose death she feels responsible.

name: Monica Everett
nativeName: モニカ・エヴァレット
description: Monica Everett is famously known as the Silent Witch for being the only human capable of casting spells without chanting. Exceedingly shy, she had trouble conversing with others; and in the worst cases, faints when meeting strangers. Because this crippling anxiety affected her performance at a magic academy, Monica decided to bypass her fears by avoiding chanting entirely. searchTerms: モニカ・エヴァレット

name: Utena Hiiragi
description: __Height:__ 154 cm Utena is a shy and introverted girl who longingly admires magical girls, collects their memorabilia, and talks passionately about them. Her obsession with Tres Magia even reached to the point where she wished to fight alongside them, but that ultimately led to her being tricked by [Venalita](https://anilist.co/character/301180). At times, she can be simple-minded.

name: Yuuko Kanoe
description: ~!(at the time of death) 75 years old (current age)!~ __Height:__ 168 cm A young girl who was left to die alone in the old school building of Seikyou Private Academy long ago. She has no recollection of how she died and is currently searching for clues together with Teiichi Niiya. As a ghost, she is normally invisible to the people in the school, with the exceptions of Teiichi and Kirie Kanoe, a blood relative who can also see her. name: Yakumo Yuurakutei

name: Makoto Tsukimoto
description: Smile is a member of the Katase High table tennis club, along with his best friend Peco. Unlike the other members of the club, Smile thinks of the sport as a job or a way to pass time. He does not try to enjoy it for fun and often lets less able players beat him out of consideration for their feelings. The other members of the club nicknamed him Smile because he never does. ~!In the epilogue, he becomes a ping pong coach for kids and new players.!~

name: Sumireko Sanshokuin
description: Sumireko Sanshokuin is one of the three initial heroines introduced in the series. Her nickname, Pansy, is a wordplay from her full name 三色院菫子. When the 院 and 子 removed, the remaining character (三色菫) form the Japanese name for Viola tricolor or Wild Pansy flower. She is usually called by her nickname to those who are close to her. name: Yuuta Togashi
description: A high school boy who used to be a delusional teen, believing himself to be the Dark Flame Master and becoming alienated from everyone as a result. Finding this to be embarrassing, he attempts to erase this past from existence, even choosing to go to a separate high school from all of his junior high school classmates. However, after encountering [Rikka](https://anilist.co/character/65865), his past delusions come back to haunt him.

name: Rize Kamishiro
description: __Height:__ 164 cm Rize Kamishiro is a ghoul that was hanging out at Anteiku. She set her eyes on Ken Kaneki, but moments before eating him, she died in an accident and her organs were transplanted in Ken Kaneki, making him half-ghoul.
